## Original Description
A use of uninitialized pointer vulnerability exists in the MSI format atom functionality of Open Babel 3.1.1 and master commit 530dbfa3. A specially crafted malformed file can lead to arbitrary code execution. title: Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in MOL2 attribute/value parser
